creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
living my life up in the sky ✨🎈🌅🌄🏞️✨ sunrise hot air balloon @nazarballoons flight with 3️⃣6️⃣0️⃣ view @insta360 X5 in #cappadocia #Türkiye #insta360x5 @insta360mysg 

📍#hotairballoons flights in cappadocia is such a dream & viewing amazing landscape 🏞️ over #Göreme during sunrise is incredible.. in summer the pick up time is around 4am & the balloons 🎈 will take off around 5am ☀️ 

#nazarballoons provided light snacks for breakfast before flight, preparing us for safety briefing before take off & champagne toast after landing 

hot air balloons don’t take off daily due to weather changes & usually the confirmation & pick up time will be informed the night before
